answers: Stack Overflow = Q&A site for programmers. 50M+ questions answered. Search before asking — your question likely exists.
Asking good questions: include error message, what you tried, relevant code, expected vs actual behavior, and technology versions.
Answering tips: be clear, include code examples, explain why (not just how), and edit for clarity.
Reputation: earn by asking good questions and answering well. 15 rep to upvote, 50 to comment, 125 to downvote.
